sections.paragraph:
παραμένω [παρά, μένω; ‘remain beside/near’] ‘remain in close association w. someone’

—a. of making a visit stay 1 Cor 16:6.

—b. by ext. remain, continue in a state or condition Phil 1:25 (Paul expects to remain alive and be in touch with his addressees); Hb 7:23; of earnest interest Js 1:25.
